children.text: The F.A.S. Motorsports 6" T304 Stainless Steel Axel-Back Exhaust system is engineered specifically for 2011+ Ford Super Duty trucks equipped with the 6.7L Powerstroke diesel engine. This premium exhaust upgrade delivers exceptional performance gains while providing a deep, aggressive exhaust note that commands attention.

Your Ford Super Duty is a beast, but the stock exhaust system is holding it back. Our 6" Axel-Back exhaust is the ultimate upgrade for the Powerstroke owner who demands maximum performance, a deep and aggressive exhaust note, and a look that sets their truck apart from the crowd.

While most aftermarket exhausts are only 4" or 5" in diameter, our massive 6" system is one of the largest on the market. This means significantly improved exhaust flow, lower EGTs (Exhaust Gas Temperatures), and a noticeable increase in horsepower and torque.

Crafted from premium stainless steel, this exhaust is built to last. It's resistant to rust and corrosion, ensuring that it will look and perform great for years to come. The slip-fit design makes for a quick and easy installation, so you can spend less time in the garage and more time on the road.

children.text: Upgrade your forced induction system with the FAS Motorsports 2.7L billet supercharger snout, the benchmark in high flow performance and strength for Hellcat, Redeye, Demon, and Trackhawk builds. This billet snout upgrade features a true 108mm supercharger inlet that outflows both OEM ported units and competitor billet snouts. CNC-machined from premium billet aluminum, it withstands the most demanding applications, whether you're building a street monster or a competitive drag car.
Compatible with factory and oversized throttle bodies, this snout delivers dyno-proven gains of
over typical ported units. The direct bolt-on design guarantees a perfect fit on 2.4L, 2.7L, and 3.0L IHI superchargers found on Hellcat, Redeye, Demon, Trackhawk, and select RAM models.

Developed with racers and tuners in mind, the FAS snout features a factory badge mount and is designed for seamless integration with other FAS performance upgrades. Experience the difference—unleash the full potential of your build with FAS Motorsports.
FAS billet snouts consistently outperform both OEM-port and "race ported" competitor snouts, offering an industry-leading inlet size and smoother airflow.​
Many alternative billet options sacrifice structural integrity for cost. FAS takes pride in over-engineering every aspect after months of R&D and testing.​
Accepts factory badges for a seamless OEM+ appearance and is compatible with factory and upgraded pulleys.
Backed by knowledgeable staff—FAS Motorsports is trusted by top tuners and performance shops.

children.text: The FAS Crank Pin Kit is a critical reliability upgrade for any Hellcat platform running increased boost, smaller upper pulleys, or aggressive tuning. The factory crank is prone to slip under load, which can throw off timing, damage the crankshaft, or cause catastrophic engine failure. This kit eliminates that risk by securely pinning the crankshaft and ensuring the balancer stays locked in place no matter how hard the car is pushed.

Precision-machined components, OEM-fit tooling, and a straightforward installation process make this kit ideal for both street and high-horsepower builds. Whether you’re running a mild pulley swap or a full race setup, this is the insurance your Hellcat needs to stay consistent, safe, and ready for more power.
